text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser gets injured during training,
so I bring her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for worrying you. It doesn't seem like that
big a deal, though.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Let's head back to the track.
choice_data_list: You're really planning to run again already?
You're really planning to run again already?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's fine! I mean, sure, my nose might bleed, I
could break into a fever, or even hives... But I just
know I've got more energy than anyone!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I can't just sit around resting while everyone
else is out there working!
choice_data_list: Right now, what you need to do is rest.
All right, so long as we keep it reasonable.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I had a feeling you'd say that...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But it's times like these that I have to work hard,
or I'll just stay ordinary forever...
choice_data_list:
If you're not healthy, you can't be a star, let
alone ordinary.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll get plenty of rest today so that my
injury heals faster.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser sounds slightly
disappointed, but she returns to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll be nice and careful while I run!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... The injury from earlier is hurting again... I
guess I got a little ahead of myself...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm really sorry, Trainer, but I guess I'm going to
have to pack it up for the day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser sounds regretful, but returns
to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I think I can do this as long as I don't go
all out!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's go! I'll keep things reasonable, just
like you said! Mun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser stays mindful of her injury
and trains comfortably within her limits.
